changes.summary: New BC-12 UploadMediaUseCase: uploadImage, uploadAvatar, uploadCommunityAvatar orchestrate S3-config gate, base64 ingress via UploadsService.toMulterFile, and community-lead permission check (inv-08). Exports input types, UploadNotConfiguredError, createUploadMediaUseCase factory.

P-7: added toMulterFile — single canonical base64/data-URL → Express.Multer.File conversion. Existing uploadImage/uploadAvatar/uploadCommunityAvatar retain Multer→S3 pipeline for REST (multipart) and tRPC (via use case).
P-7: removed three duplicated base64→Multer blocks. uploadImage, uploadAvatar, uploadCommunityAvatar delegate to createUploadMediaUseCase; mapUploadError translates use-case exceptions to TRPCError.

notes: UploadsController (REST multipart) unchanged outside write_set; continues to call UploadsService with native Multer files. UploadMediaUseCase not registered in Nest module (factory pattern matches other phase-6 routers).
